channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Amtrak Considers Easing Gun Rules, Reports Say
item.description: Sources indicate Amtrak may revise its policy on firearms. Concerns have been raised regarding potential security impacts.

item.title: David Muir Reports on Boys' Heart Transplants
item.description: Three boys awaiting heart transplants formed a friendship at Texas Children's Hospital, ultimately receiving their matches.

item.title: Empire State Building Celebrates 95th Anniversary
item.description: Good Morning America highlights the iconic building, a symbol of New York City's skyline for 95 years.

item.title: Kentucky bank robbery leaves two employees dead, suspect in custody
item.description: Police report that a bank robbery in Kentucky resulted in the deaths of two employees. A person of interest has been identified and is being sought.
